title: Lab: Repair a Prompt
prompt_md: **Hands-on lab.** The starter prompt below is too vague to reliably produce good unit tests. Edit it so it satisfies every requirement, then submit. Grading is automatic and deterministic — each requirement is checked by rule, no model is run, so you get instant feedback on what's still missing.

requirements.label: Name the test framework to use (e.g. pytest, jest, JUnit)
Ask for edge cases (empty, boundary, null, or invalid input)
Specify the output format (a diff, or a single test file)
Wrap the function's code in delimiters (e.g. triple backticks)
